events.name: VfL Wolfsburg at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: Bundesliga leaders Bayer Leverkusen outplayed champions Bayern Munich for a 3-0 victory on Saturday that sent them five points clear at the top of the league and put them firmly in charge of the title race.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen crush Bayern to go 5 points clear

video.headline: Leverkusen thump Bayern, move five points clear in Bundesliga

tracking.trackingName: SOC_Highlight (Leverkusen thump Bayern for huge win) 2024/02/10 ESHEET
